results.validation_notes: Previous classification as Microservices/Serverless/Event-Driven was incorrect. The heuristic detected serverless.yml, Terraform files, and Kafka/RabbitMQ references, but these are TEST FIXTURES and EMULATION TARGETS - LocalStack emulates these services for users to test against. LocalStack itself is a single Python container with modular internal structure. The docker-compose.yml defines ONE service (localstack), and the Dockerfile produces ONE container image. This is a modular monolith that internally organizes different AWS service emulators as modules within a single deployable.
